test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lift_orders (orderkey UInt64, payload String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY orderkey
CREATE TABLE lift_lineitem (orderkey UInt64, payload String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY orderkey
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lift_orders SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers(10000000)
INSERT INTO lift_lineitem SELECT number, toString(number) FROM numbers(10000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_orders WHERE orderkey = 1234567) AS o INNER JOIN lift_lineitem AS l ON o.orderkey = l.orderkey SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_orders WHERE orderkey = 1234567) AS o INNER JOIN lift_lineitem AS l ON o.orderkey = l.orderkey SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1

SELECT sum(l.orderkey) FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_orders WHERE orderkey BETWEEN 1000000 AND 1000100) AS o LEFT JOIN lift_lineitem AS l ON o.orderkey = l.orderkey SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0

SELECT sum(l.orderkey) FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_orders WHERE orderkey BETWEEN 1000000 AND 1000100) AS o LEFT JOIN lift_lineitem AS l ON o.orderkey = l.orderkey SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
